name: relaydevkit
description: RelayDevKit reduces the engineering blocker to adopting RIF Relay by making integration reproducible and testable end-to-end. The deliverable is practical developer infrastructure: a known-good local environment, deterministic tests, and a CI template that turns Relay integration into a verifiable workflow. This enables more wallets and dApps to adopt relayed transactions confidently without requiring marketing or LOIs to justify demand.
author: SupercoolKayy
